description: Vertical, portrait-orientation slogan graphic built on a full-color outdoor photograph. In the foreground, an older man with grey hair and beard, wearing a dark short-sleeve shirt, stands with his hands cuffed behind his back. To his right an officer is shown from behind wearing a green camouflage tactical vest with patches reading 'POLICE' and 'ICE,' khaki tactical pants, and a holstered sidearm. The setting is a grassy area with a chain-link fence and green trees. A solid dark-blue rectangle in the left-center contains the slogan in bold white serif text on three lines: 'Making America Safe Again.'
